pages.title: Colossus Heart
pages.text: A remnant of enormous weight and stored violence. The Heart is for bearers who can survive punishment long enough to turn it back outward as ruin.

pages.title: Dormant and Latent
pages.text: $(l)Dormant$(): Grants armor, knockback resistance, and a heavy movement penalty. It also shrugs off petty environmental harm.$(br2)$(l)Latent$(): The Heart hardens further, ignores even more chip damage, and begins building $(thing)Tremor$() when the bearer suffers physical punishment. Tremor slowly fades out of combat, but while it lasts the Heart starts fighting back harder.

pages.title: Awakened, Ascended, Transcendent, Apex
pages.text: $(l)Awakened$(): Tremor becomes a true combat mechanic. Heavy hits pulse outward, nearby enemies are staggered, and the bearer becomes fully resistant to knockback.$(br2)$(l)Ascended$(): Tremor grants stronger damage, the Heart bleeds part of incoming physical damage into Absorption, and the base burden eases.$(br2)$(l)Transcendent$(): The movement penalty falls away entirely, letting the Heart keep its mass without feeling anchored.$(br2)$(l)Apex$(): Maximum Tremor turns the next exchange into a siege blow, with the Heart at its hardest and most punishing.
